source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #31875

Problem Summary: ddl test sometimes failed due to client-go data race

### What is changed and how it works?

- add `TestMain` and move `EnableFailpoint` into it (this step should fix the issue)
- fix goroutine leaks

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->
- [x] Unit test

### Release note
```release-note
None
```

symptoms: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test
failure_signature: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test
root_cause_explanation: The test failures were caused by concurrency hazards in the DDL test suite: enabling failpoints and running test setup in the wrong lifecycle could trigger client-go data races, and missing cleanup (unclosed clients/stores) could leak goroutines/resources between tests. This PR stabilizes the suite by moving failpoint enabling into a package-level `TestMain` and by adding proper cleanup/closing (plus goleak verification) to prevent goroutine leaks and cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Fix test lifecycle for concurrency + cleanup (use TestMain for global setup; close resources; verify goroutine leaks).

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race and goroutine leak in test
files: ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_tiflash_test.go, ddl/main_test.go, ddl/options_test.go, ddl/partition_test.go, ddl/placement_policy_ddl_test.go, ddl/table_test.go
